chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, CJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. No.D-1764 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For order as to non-prosecution of CMA No.8570/2024. 2. For hearing of CMA No.7956/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 14th May 2024 Syed Kavish Hussain Naqvi, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. M/s. Abdul Qayyum Abbasi and Adnan Abdullah, Advocates for Applicant/Intervenor. -*-*-*-*-*- O R D E R Today, statement has been filed on behalf of the petitioner alongwith copy of a letter dated 22.04.2024 issued by the Section Officer (HGOs), Ministry of Religious Affairs and Interfaith Harmony, Government of Pakistan, whereby, the authority has been pleased to allow Hajj operation to M/s. Al-Aswed Travel (Pvt) Ltd. (Enrollment No.4389) for Hajj 2024 and HGO-MIS of the company has also been activated accordingly. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that in view of the aforesaid letter instant petition may be disposed of, however, with direction to the respondents not to take any adverse action against the petitioner in violation of law. Learned counsel for the applicant/intervenor submits that since he is representing one of the directors of the company, namely, Shakir Yousuf, who has been illegally removed from the directorship, whereas, JCM No.7/2024 before the learned Company Judge of this [Page 2] Court has been filed, whereas, petitioner has also filed counter JCM No.15/2024, which are to be heard and decided in accordance with law, therefore, requests that disposal of instant petition may not affect the merits of those proceedings.

Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that in view of the aforesaid letter instant petition may be disposed of, however, with direction to the respondents not to take any adverse action against the petitioner in violation of law. Learned counsel for the applicant/intervenor submits that since he is representing one of the directors of the company, namely, Shakir Yousuf, who has been illegally removed from the directorship, whereas, JCM No.7/2024 before the learned Company Judge of this [Page 2] Court has been filed, whereas, petitioner has also filed counter JCM No.15/2024, which are to be heard and decided in accordance with law, therefore, requests that disposal of instant petition may not affect the merits of those proceedings. Accordingly, instant Constitution Petition is disposed of in view of the letter dated 22.04.2024 issued by the Section Officer (HGOs), Ministry of Religious Affairs and Interfaith Harmony, Government of Pakistan. However, the parties are at liberty to continue to seek redressal of their grievance, if any, in the aforesaid JCMs before the learned Company Judge of this Court, who may decide the same independently in accordance with law at an early date after hearing the parties. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
